title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 433.060 - Remedy of surety
text:
433.060.  Remedy of surety. — When such payment by a surety shall be made in money, such surety may recover the same, with the interest; and when such payment is made in property, he may recover the value, with interest.
(RSMo 1939 § 3325) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2938; 1919 § 12694; 1909 § 11276
